incident: A definition-discovery command printed head(2) records from files whose names matched *definition*, including economic summary columns. The intended scope was outcome-free definition manifests.
response: did not use printed values to choose any economic field, level, anchor, address, or rule
preserved pre-incident campaign, approval, and full-registry hashes
independent reviewer accepted the initial unchanged freeze, then blocked the first post-incident correction because its new exact anchors lacked independent provenance
did not publish the blocked registry
applied verbatim a complete correction specification produced by a separate outcome-isolated constructor from source manifests and mechanism rules
requires fresh independent review of the exact final packet and incident history before publication
post_incident_change_basis: An outcome-isolated independent constructor chose the exact source anchors, mechanism anchors, component nulls, family controls, KDA variants and aggregation rules. The parent applied that specification verbatim; changes were not informed by the accidentally displayed economic values.
